note: Composite from PixelLab source 9416fdb3 (square table, excellent horizontal wood grain striations, bevelled frame). Wood region x∈[55,344] y∈[57,340] from source stretched via nearest-neighbour to x∈[15,384] y∈[15,399] in output. 15-px soft sky-blue (#a8c8d8) tile-floor strip on top, left, right only — no floor at bottom (bottom edge of table intentionally off-canvas). Dark-honey (#8a5a2a) 1-px bevel line at wood/floor seam on three visible sides (y=15, x=15, x=385). Script: scripts/composite-table-bg.mjs.
